context.description: All three files have been migrated. This phase adds org-bound query variants and performs final verification.

task.objective: Add org-bound functions to getQueriesForOrg() and final verification

step.description: Add org-bound functions to getQueriesForOrg() in lib/db/index.ts
step.details:
Import the new functions: ```typescript import { getOrganizationMembers, getOrgInvites, isUserMemberOfOrg, } from "./orgs" ```
Add to the return object of getQueriesForOrg(): ```typescript // Organization queries (org-bound) getOrganizationMembers: () => getOrganizationMembers(organizationId), getOrgInvites: () => getOrgInvites(organizationId), isUserMemberOfOrg: (userId: number) => isUserMemberOfOrg(userId, organizationId), ```

step.command: grep -r "db-orgs\|db-users\|db-wishlist" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" app/ components/ lib/ | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".xml"
step.expected: No results (all old imports should be gone)

step.command: ls -la lib/db-*.ts 2>/dev/null || echo "All db-*.ts files deleted"

step.description: Update lib/db structure in CLAUDE.md (if needed)
step.details: If the CLAUDE.md mentions the lib/ structure, update to include: - lib/db/orgs.ts - lib/db/wishlist.ts - lib/db/users.ts

verification_checklist.item: lib/db/orgs.ts exists and exports all org functions
lib/db/wishlist.ts exists and exports all wishlist functions
lib/db/users.ts exists and exports all user functions
lib/db/types.ts includes Organization, OrganizationMember, OrganizationWithRole, DashboardUser, Invite
Only one getSql() definition exists (in connection.ts)

task.success_criteria: - All verification checks pass - Org-bound functions added to getQueriesForOrg() - No old file references remain - Build passes - Feature complete

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with FINAL completion status.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/status.md
with: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: phases/04_cleanup_verification.xml - Phase: 04 - Final Cleanup & Verification - Status: completed - Mark feature as COMPLETE - Summary: - 3 files migrated to lib/db/ - 5 types added to types.ts - 32 functions now exported from lib/db - 3 org-bound functions added to getQueriesForOrg() - Duplicate getSql() removed - All old files deleted

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(remaining-db-refactoring): phase-04 - Complete database abstraction with org-bound queries
mandatory_commit_step.action: 1. Stage: git add lib/db/ docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/ 2. Commit with format above 3. Feature is now complete!
